meaning: adj.饰头巾,头发编梳的式样
examples: The character on this man's headdress means "spirit".
Fashioning a headdress with a light colored material will keep the sun off the skin.
He usesthe pointer to drawattention to an ornate headdress composed ofhundreds of tiny beads.
He wears a men's traditional warrior outfit which includes a giant eagle feather headdress and bustle.
Lady Gaga is moving the headdress needle far more than alerts from the American Melanoma Foundation.
